scripts.ios:add: npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios && node ../../tools/native-shell/apply.mjs --game shell_template && node ../../tools/native-shell/validate.mjs --game shell_template
scripts.ios:sync: npx cap sync ios && node ../../tools/native-shell/apply.mjs --game shell_template && node ../../tools/native-shell/validate.mjs --game shell_template
